body.processed:
Eight bookable meeting rooms of various sizes, each equipped with 4K displays, video conferencing systems, and whiteboard walls. From intimate 4-person huddle rooms to a 20-person boardroom, we have the right space for every conversation.

Room Options

  • Huddle Rooms (4): 2-4 people, perfect for quick meetings
  • Conference Rooms (3): 6-10 people, ideal for team meetings
  • Boardroom (1): Up to 20 people, full AV setup

Book rooms by the hour through our member app. Included hours vary by plan.

body.processed:
Our fully stocked kitchen is the heart of the Hive. Grab a fresh cup of locally roasted coffee, heat up your lunch, or take a break on the lounge sofas. It is also where some of the best spontaneous conversations and collaborations happen.

Always Available

  • Locally roasted drip coffee and espresso
  • Selection of teas and sparkling water
  • Full-size refrigerator and microwave
  • Dishwasher
  • Complimentary snacks (fruit, granola bars, nuts)

A versatile 1,200 sq ft event space that transforms from workshop classroom to networking venue to product launch party. Equipped with a stage, projector, sound system, and flexible seating for up to 80 people.

Popular Uses

  • Tech meetups and hackathons
  • Startup pitch nights
  • Workshops and training sessions
  • Product launches and demos
  • Networking events

Members receive discounted rates. Contact us for pricing and availability.

body.processed:
Five early-stage startups pitch their ideas to a panel of local investors, mentors, and fellow entrepreneurs. Each founder gets 5 minutes to present followed by 3 minutes of Q&A. Networking with appetizers and drinks follows the pitches.

Why Attend

  • Discover innovative local startups
  • Network with investors and founders
  • Get inspired by entrepreneurial energy
  • Enjoy complimentary food and drinks

Topics Covered

  • AI writing assistants for content creation
  • Code generation and debugging with AI
  • Automated data analysis workflows
  • AI-powered design tools
  • Prompt engineering best practices

body.processed:
Hive Works was founded in 2019 by two remote workers who were tired of coffee shops and home offices. They envisioned a workspace that combined the productivity of an office with the energy of a startup and the warmth of a community center.

Our Mission

To create the most productive, connected, and inspiring workspace for independent professionals, remote workers, and small teams in the region.

The Space

Located in a beautifully renovated industrial warehouse, Hive Works spans 15,000 square feet across two floors. Natural light floods through original skylights, exposed brick walls provide character, and modern furnishings ensure comfort throughout the day.

Community First

We are not just a workspace provider. We actively cultivate community through events, introductions, collaboration opportunities, and a culture of mutual support.
body.summary: Hive Works was founded in 2019 by two remote workers who were tired of coffee shops and home offices. They envisioned a workspace that combined the productivity of an office with the energy of a start

body.processed:
Can I try the space before committing?

Absolutely. We offer a free day pass so you can experience Hive Works firsthand. Just sign up on our website or drop by during business hours.

What is the minimum commitment?

All plans are month-to-month with 30 days notice to cancel. No long-term contracts required.

Is parking available?

Yes, we have a dedicated parking lot with 40 spaces and street parking nearby. Bicycle racks and a repair station are also available.

Do you have reliable internet?

We run redundant 1 Gbps fiber connections with enterprise-grade mesh WiFi covering the entire space. Average speeds exceed 500 Mbps.

Can I bring guests?

Dedicated Desk and Private Office members can bring guests. Hot Desk members can purchase guest day passes at a discounted rate.
